todo.title: Encryption Engine — AES-256 via cryptography
todo.description: Add 'cryptography' package to dependencies. Create core/encryption.py with encrypt_data(data, key) and decrypt_data(ciphertext, key) using Fernet (AES-128-CBC with HMAC) or AES-256-GCM. Generate per-user master key stored in ~/.config/dotghostboard/.key (mode 600). Key derived from master password via PBKDF2 if password is set.

todo.title: Secret Item Schema — encrypted content column
todo.description: Add 'is_secret' BOOLEAN DEFAULT 0 and 'encrypted_content' BLOB columns to clipboard_items table via migration. When is_secret=1, content column is NULL and encrypted_content holds AES ciphertext. Add mark_as_secret(item_id), unmark_as_secret(item_id) in storage.py. Decrypt on-the-fly when displaying secret items.

todo.title: Toggle Secret — Lock/Unlock icon on ItemCard
todo.description: Add a lock icon button on each ItemCard. Click to toggle 'is_secret' status. Secret items show a blurred preview with '🔒 Encrypted' overlay. Clicking a locked secret item prompts for master password to decrypt and reveal. Show eye icon to re-lock after viewing.

todo.title: Master Password Lock — Startup Authentication
todo.description: Add optional master password setup in Settings. When enabled, app shows a password dialog on launch before revealing the dashboard. Password is verified against a stored PBKDF2 hash in ~/.config/dotghostboard/.master_hash. Option to disable/remove master password in Settings (requires current password).

todo.title: Password Dialog — Lock Screen UI
todo.description: Create a sleek lock screen dialog matching the dark neon theme. Fields: password input (masked), 'Unlock' button. Show error shake animation on wrong password. 'Forgot password?' warning: encrypted items become permanently inaccessible if password is lost. Option to set new password on first run.

todo.title: Auto-Lock — Inactivity Timer
todo.description: Add 'auto_lock_minutes' setting (default: 0 = disabled) in data/settings.json. Track last activity timestamp (mouse move, key press, clipboard change). When idle exceeds threshold, trigger lock: clear decrypted cache, show password dialog. Reset timer on any user interaction. Expose setting in Settings panel.

todo.title: Stealth Mode — Hide from Taskbar & Alt-Tab
todo.description: Add 'stealth_mode' boolean setting. When enabled: set window flags to Qt.Tool (hides from taskbar + alt-tab). App is accessible only via system tray icon or global hotkey Ctrl+Shift+V. Toggle in Settings panel with preview explanation. Visual indicator in tray icon when stealth is active (e.g., ghost emoji overlay).

todo.title: Secure Delete — Overwrite Before Removal
todo.description: Add secure_delete(item_id) in storage.py. Before deleting DB row: if item has associated .png file, overwrite file bytes with random data 3 times, then unlink. For text items, overwrite the DB content field with random string before DELETE. Add 'secure_delete' setting (default: false) to enable by default. Confirmation dialog warns about irreversibility.

todo.title: App Whitelist/Blacklist — Monitor Exclusions
todo.description: Add 'excluded_apps' list in settings.json (e.g., ['keepassxc', 'bitwarden']). In watcher.py, detect active window process name via xprop or wmctrl. Skip clipboard capture if current app is in exclusion list. Add UI in Settings to manage the list: add/remove app names with autocomplete suggestions from running processes.

todo.title: Unit Tests for v1.4.0 Features
todo.description: Add tests/test_encryption.py covering: key generation, encrypt/decrypt roundtrip, PBKDF2 hashing, secure delete overwrite. Add tests for auto-lock timer logic, whitelist/blacklist filtering. Test migration for new columns. Target: 15+ new tests.
